message:
fix(api): add #[must_use] to cuckoo_filter, count_min_sketch, fibonacci_heap, hyperloglog, kd_tree

61 annotations across 5 probabilistic/spatial data structures:
- cuckoo_filter: 11 (new, with_config, with_capacity, lookup, count, capacity, load_factor, is_empty, stats, num_buckets, bucket_size)
- count_min_sketch: 15 (new, with_dimensions, with_config, from_error_params x2, estimate, total_count, width, depth, is_empty, memory_bytes, epsilon, delta, stats, inner_product)
- fibonacci_heap: 8 (new, len, is_empty, peek, get_key, get_value, into_sorted, sorted)
- hyperloglog: 14 (new, with_precision, with_config, cardinality, cardinality_f64, total_inserts, precision, register_count, memory_bytes, standard_error, nonzero_registers, is_empty, stats, jaccard)
- kd_tree: 13 (VecPoint::new/new2d/new3d, KdTree::new/build/nearest/k_nearest/range_query/radius_query/len/is_empty/dims/points)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
